blog_opportunities.title: No Stupid Questions
blog_opportunities.concept: The underexamined upside of LLMs — the ability to ask questions without shame. Counterargument to book's thesis.

blog_opportunities.title: Vibe Writing
blog_opportunities.concept: Why vibe-coding is celebrated but vibe-writing called AI slop. Uses tracing paper metaphor. Explores authorship when friction is optional.

blog_opportunities.title: Where Do the Serious Writers Go?
blog_opportunities.concept: Literary talent migrating to video, podcasts, games instead of text. What does this mean for cognitive culture?

blog_opportunities.title: The Phaedrus Pattern
blog_opportunities.concept: Every new writing technology triggers anxiety, each time something real is at stake. Pattern: remove friction, wait, find what was lost.

blog_opportunities.title: Humans Read, Computers Count
blog_opportunities.concept: How LLMs process tokens vs human embodied reading. PDFs as concrete hook.
blog_opportunities.notes: Needs synthesis — material diffused across daily note
